title: Revamp Revamp no Mi
body:
This mod aims to revamp or rework existing fruits or models in mine mine no mi.

UPDATE 2: Doku, Gura, and Kira!

KIRA
1.  Lowered Kira's cooldown scaling for diamond body. Diamond body punch dmg +1.
2.  Brilliant Punk should be more reliable/easier to hit.

DOKU
1.  Slightly remodeled Venom Demon
2.  Increased cooldown of most abilities

GURA
1.  Added spheres for Gekishin and its respective alt mode.
2.  Added new Shattering Leap ability
3.  Changed alt mode for Shingen no Ichigeki to be an uppercut instead
4.  Added particles for certain abilities and partial morphs
5.  Shima Yurashi can be imbued with haki now

UPDATE 1: Magu

Added alt modes for Magu Magu no Mi to allow you to use explosions instead of lava when firing certain abilities. These two abilities are Dai Funka and Ryusei Kazan. To compensate for the lack of lava, they do +3 explosive dmg per projectile.

Added Magma Walker

Added particles and sound cues for Bakuretsu Kazan

Thanks WarCarr for having a public source code for mmnm reworks, it helped a lot :D
